behavior_summary: U8P_LITLMUSH::look implements the in-game examine/"U8P_LITLMUSH::look" behavior for a small mushroom item: it displays the short description text "mushroom" when the player inspects the item.

U8P_LITLMUSH::use implements consuming/using the mushroom: it plays a short eating bark, applies a feed effect to the avatar (FeedAvatar), then performs a probabilistic side-effect driven by urandom(0x10).

On a successful random roll (~75% chance: urandom(0x10) > 0x03) the side-effect checks the consuming actor's HP (Npc::getHp). If HP > 3 it subtracts 3 HP (Npc::setHp). If HP <= 3 and the global palette-effects flag is not active, it spawns a MOREFOOD effect (spawn ->MOREFOOD::func0080).
The mushroom item is destroyed after U8P_LITLMUSH::use (Item::destroy).
notable_control_flow: Player 'U8P_LITLMUSH::look' action -> U8P_LITLMUSH::look -> display short description 'mushroom' -> suspend/return.
Player 'U8P_LITLMUSH::use' action -> U8P_LITLMUSH::use -> Bark 'Mmmm...' -> FeedAvatar(0x02) -> random_roll = urandom(0x10).
If random_roll <= 0x03: no special side-effect; else if random_roll > 0x03: read actor HP; if HP > 3 then set HP = HP - 3; otherwise if shroomPaletteEffectsActive is false then spawn MOREFOOD effect.
After branching and side-effects, always call Item::destroy(this) to remove the mushroom.
open_questions: FeedAvatar's concrete effect: inferred to change hunger or play an animation, but exact gameplay impact (stat restored, buff applied, or only animation) is not explicit.
The exact visual/functional behavior of spawn ->MOREFOOD::func0080 is inferred (likely a palette/visual effect or additional food appearance); details are unknown.
shroomPaletteEffectsActive is inferred as the global flag name; confidence is not absolute — confirmation from canonical symbol data would be helpful.
Whether U8P_LITLMUSH::use ever targets an actor other than the player avatar (multiplayer/AI actors) is not explicit.

main_function.name: U8P_LITLMUSH::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short on-screen description when the player examines the mushroom item.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player performs the 'U8P_LITLMUSH::look' (examine) action on the mushroom item.

function_map.name: U8P_LITLMUSH::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_LITLMUSH::look handler that displays the short description text

function_map.name: U8P_LITLMUSH::use
function_map.role: consume/U8P_LITLMUSH::use handler that applies feed effect, runs a probabilistic side-effect (HP loss or spawn), and destroys the item

function_map.name: FeedAvatar
function_map.role: apply feeding effect/animation to avatar (called by U8P_LITLMUSH::use)

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: generate random value used to decide whether to run the mushroom side-effect

function_map.name: Npc::getHp
function_map.role: read actor HP to decide side-effect branch

function_map.name: Npc::setHp
function_map.role: write actor HP to subtract HP as a negative side-effect

function_map.name: spawn ->MOREFOOD::func0080
function_map.role: spawn or trigger a MOREFOOD effect when actor HP is low and palette-effects flag is off

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: destroy/remove the mushroom item instance after U8P_LITLMUSH::use

external_calls.purpose: Apply a feeding effect/animation to the consuming avatar (called with parameter 0x02 inferred from decompilation).
Generate a random number in range 0x10 to decide whether the mushroom side-effect runs (compared to 0x03).
Read the target actor's HP to decide whether to subtract HP or spawn MOREFOOD.
Set the actor's HP to HP - 3 when the side-effect triggers and HP > 3.
Spawn a MOREFOOD effect when actor HP is too low to subtract and the palette-effects flag permits it.
Destroy the mushroom item instance (cleanup) after U8P_LITLMUSH::use.

reads.name: shroomPaletteEffectsActive
reads.likely_effect: Boolean that gates whether the MOREFOOD spawn/palette effect should be suppressed (spawn occurs only if this is false).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_LITLMUSH::look implements the in-game examine/"U8P_LITLMUSH::look" behavior for a small mushroom item: it displays the short description text "mushroom" when the player inspects the item.
